author: Brandon Bachmeier
name: Better Media v2
description: Phase 5 — adds the Spotify Web API polling path. /api/spotify/status checked each 1.5s tick (parallel with SMTC); /api/spotify/playback fetched when authed; /api/spotify/queue fetched every 6s. Adds a 'Spotify' badge to the status line and an 'Up next' label when a queue is available. No buttons for Connect/Library yet.
